items.html:
v1.0.5 — July 22, 2026

• Pomodoro Timer — Added a project-based timer with custom hours and minutes, Start, Play, Pause and Stop controls, persistent countdown state, and an audible notification when a session finishes.
• Pomodoro Shortcut — Added a live countdown shortcut in the Webflow sidebar that opens Time Tracking directly and remains synchronized while running or paused.
• Project Filtering — Selecting a project now filters Today, This Week, This Month, This Year, All Time, the weekly chart, and the yearly activity grid, while other project activity remains visible as muted context.
• Activity History — Added previous and next year navigation to the GitHub-style activity calendar with a clear year indicator.
• Live Time Tracking — Fixed weekly chart weighting, real-time project bar scaling, live-session colors, and keeps the current Webflow project pinned in green.

v1.0.4 — July 20, 2026

• Settings & Support — Added a live account card, extension version, license purchase shortcut, cleaner account actions, and a support email pre-filled with readable diagnostic information.
• CMS Field Groups — Updated the two-column CMS layout to support Webflow's new collapsible field groups without leaving their fields visible when collapsed.
• CMS Multi-image — Moved the Assets button into the native image-limit bar and preserved Webflow's hover menu for editing ALT text or removing individual images.
• Image Optimization — Improved CMS optimizer controls and clearly disables Optimize for SVGs and unsupported document formats.
• Golden Radius & Reliability — Improved numeric input behavior, restored the full-width calculator layout, refreshed release notes reliably, and included additional interface fixes.

v1.0.3 — July 17, 2026

• Project Parameters — Added compact MFP2 seeds to copy the complete effective settings of a Webflow project and import them from any other project, with confirmation before replacing an existing configuration.
• Reliable Imports — Fixed project-specific Pro toggles so every imported enabled or disabled state is reflected accurately in the interface.
• Publish Status — Added a Pro feature, enabled by default, that displays Publishing… and Published! states through the browser tab title and favicon.
• Feedback Form — The feedback link now pre-fills the connected account email and first name when available.
• Interface — Added clean, consistent scrollbars for MasterFlow panels and Custom Code editors on macOS and Windows.
• Documentation — Added guidance for project parameter sharing and browser-tab publish status.

v1.0.2 — July 16, 2026

• Class Copy/Paste — Added keyboard shortcuts to copy the complete class stack from one selected Webflow element and paste it onto another.
• CMS Image ALT Text — Added a compact inline ALT field below CMS images so alternative text can be viewed and edited without opening Webflow's hidden image menu.
• Image optimization — Expanded the Asset and CMS image tools with cropping, resizing, original-format export, and WebP compression.
• CMS Assets & Redirects — Improved asset picker reliability and refined bulk redirect workflows for smoother imports and management.
• Interface & Documentation — Refreshed feature guidance, screenshots, controls, and CMS organization, and retired the former CMS Accordion workflow.
• Bug fixes — Improved remote asset freshness and resolved several reliability and interface issues across CMS and asset tools.

v1.0.1 — June 27, 2026

• CMS Assets — Added an Assets button on CMS image fields so existing Webflow Assets can be selected directly from a CMS item, including empty image fields.
• CMS Image Cropper — Added a Crop button for CMS image fields that already contain an image, using the same crop workflow as the Assets panel cropper.
• Asset workflow — Improved the fallback flow that briefly opens the Assets panel, returns to CMS, restores the selected collection/item, and reopens the picker when Webflow has not exposed assets yet.
• CMS settings — Reorganized the CMS tab and documentation into Layout, Utilities, Assets, and Hide categories for easier scanning.

v1.0.0 — June 17, 2026

• Settings & Account — New account view with license status, Pro membership age, Stripe invoice access, sign out, debug info, and a full reset for local and synced extension data.
• Time Tracker — Full import/export for tracked data, summaries for Today / This week / This month / This year / All time, project totals, a Today button, and better handling of the user's local timezone.
• Activity view — Improved GitHub-style yearly activity grid with day labels, dynamic month labels, and corrected date offsets.
• Golden Radius — Refined UI for the Tools panel with clearer visual hierarchy and more consistent controls.
• Documentation — Added Time Tracking documentation, a Golden Radius card, a cleaner Designer feature order, and a dedicated Hide section.
• Chrome Web Store readiness — Removed the obfuscation module and cleaned up obsolete features and docs, including Code Embed Auto Save.
